prompt: add a node for fireworks ai
why: Hosted-flavor rule applied to LLMs: Fireworks serves an OpenAI-compatible API, so archetype-map says 'an OpenAI-compatible LLM API -> llm_openai_api profile', not necessarily a new node. Tests whether the rule (not just the table examples) is applied.

ground_truth.expected_archetype: llm_openai_api profile/variant OR llm_* clone — must at least RAISE the OpenAI-compatible option

rubric: flavor_rule: recognizes OpenAI-compatibility and raises profile-vs-new-node at Gate A
archetype: llm provider, llm_openai family reference
menu: chat/completions + embeddings + image gen + fine-tuning surface enumerated with count line
